HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[functions] Reviewing Function App runtime, trigger, storage binding, identity, and deployment posture.
table view is compact by design; the JSON artifact keeps the fuller visible field set
╭──────────────┬───────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────╮
│ function app │ hostname                      │ runtime                   │ triggers                       │ identity                                      │ deployment                    │
├──────────────┼───────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┤
│ func-orders  │ func-orders.azurewebsites.net │ PYTHON|3.11; functions=~4 │ 3 fn; HTTP, timer, Service Bus │ SystemAssigned, UserAssigned; user-assigned=1 │ storage=plain-text; kv-refs=1 │
╰──────────────┴───────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────╯
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ note                                                                                                                                                                                    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Function App 'func-orders' publishes hostname 'func-orders.azurewebsites.net', runs runtime 'PYTHON|3.11', targets Functions runtime '~4', and uses managed identity (SystemAssigned,   │
│ UserAssigned).                                                                                                                                                                          │
│ Deployment signals: AzureWebJobsStorage as plain-text app setting, 1 Key Vault-backed setting(s).                                                                                       │
│ Visible posture: public network access Enabled, HTTPS-only enabled, TLS 1.2, FTPS Disabled, Always On enabled.                                                                          │
│ Visible child functions: OrdersWebhook [HTTP; enabled; invoke URL visible; bindings=httpTrigger, http]; NightlyReconcile [timer; enabled; bindings=timerTrigger]; BusReconcile [Service │
│ Bus; disabled; bindings=serviceBusTrigger, queue]                                                                                                                                       │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 1 Function Apps visible; 1 carry managed identity context, 1 expose child-function trigger truth, 3 visible child functions were enumerated, 0 show run-from-package deployment, and 1 include Key Vault-backed settings.
